commit_scope: Close the measured fourth-arm duration gap so fkwu native http_get returns elapsed duration_ms from inside the emitted native carrier.

commands.command: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/minimal-surface.fk form-stdlib/hati-os-kernel.fk form-stdlib/hati-os-kernel-emit.fk form-stdlib/form-parse.fk form-stdlib/form-flatten.fk form-stdlib/tests/hati-os-band.fk

commands.output: PASS native-http-capture go=127 rust=127 typescript=127; PASS all-kernel-external-http go=63 rust=63 typescript=63 fourth=63; PASS http-fourth duration_ms=60 raw_detail=48; PASS all-kernel-external-https go=63 rust=63 typescript=63 fourth=63; PASS https-fourth duration_ms=180 raw_detail=48; PASS all-kernel-request-headers go=127 rust=127 typescript=127 fourth=127 url=https://postman-echo.com/headers; PASS header-fourth duration_ms=449 raw_detail=71; PASS fourth-runtime-authority fourth=127.

drift_resolved: The previous runtime-summary authority target currently returns fanout-python in production; the proof now reads api/health, which currently carries native-kernel authority headers.
The previous httpbin/header echo target was flaky across kernels; the proof now sends explicit Accept, User-Agent, and X-Form-Trace rows to postman-echo.com/headers.

ci_validation.notes: CI not run yet in this local evidence record.

deploy_validation.notes: No deploy was performed by this branch; live public endpoints were read through kernel-native carriers.

phase_gate.reason: Focused Form proof and live fourth-arm duration receipts passed locally; PR/CI and deploy freshness remain pending after push.

evidence_refs: scripts/model_vitality_native_http_capture_probe.sh -> all-kernel native HTTP/TLS and fkwu duration witness

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The emitted fourth-arm fkwu binary now measures elapsed native HTTP/TLS request duration and returns it in the shared http_get duration_ms dict field.
test_flows: Focused Hati-OS band proves the emitter and walker still compile and agree.
Live probe has fkwu return positive numeric duration_ms receipts for plaintext HTTP, verified HTTPS, and request-header HTTPS.
Live probe retains production authority header capture through a currently native public health route.
